name: SønderDø
short_description: You have to survive the night until 08:00/8 AM. The only thing you have by your side is your flashlight. It is especially hard to maneuver around the school since the teachers can hear you inside an area.
detailed_description:
You wake up at your school. You only have a flashlight. It's night and you have to survive until the next morning. Or do you?
Teachers are hunting you down trying to kill you, while you are just trying to survive the night. Watch how long you run, or else you will be tired. Be careful where you go, because that can hear you if you get too close

Features:
Stamina for sprinting.
Flashlight.
Interactives.

Disclaimer:
This game takes place at a school in Denmark. Nothing has ever happened at this school and this game is not made to give a negative impression on the school.
